backend/file-storage/file-storage.mo: Motoko module implementing file storage with chunked upload, delete, list, and HTTP streaming support using ordered maps for assets and pending uploads.
backend/file-storage/http.mo: Motoko module defining HTTP types (request, response, streaming token, streaming callback, and strategy) used by the file storage system.
backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining all backend data types (waivers, gallery, content, etc.) and initializing ordered map storage for the Kids Indoor Play & Event application.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the PrivateEvents component was updated with new rental prices ($650 for 2-hour, $800 for 3-hour) in the frontend.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key functionality of each component, hook, and utility.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration that exposes the .well-known directory and sets CORS and caching headers for the ii-alternative-origins file.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md: Documentation explaining how to configure Internet Identity alternative origins and derivation origins to fix authentication issues, especially on mobile devices.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_STATUS.md: Comprehensive status document listing all implemented backend endpoints and frontend features, plus a deployment checklist for the Kids Conservatory ICP application.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with full SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter card, and structured business contact data for the KIDS Indoor Play & Event Oklahoma City site.
frontend/public/.ic-assets.json5: Minimal ICP asset config that ensures the .well-known directory is not ignored during deployment.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: Lists the custom domains (kids405.com and www.kids405.com) associated with this ICP canister for domain verification.
frontend/public/.well-known/ii-alternati: Specifies alternative Internet Identity origins allowed for authentication, including the ICP0 subdomain URLs for the canister.
frontend/public/env.json: Runtime environment configuration providing the backend canister ID and Internet Identity derivation origin for the frontend application.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt configuration for kids405.com that allows all major search engines to crawl the site while blocking admin, waiver-check, and other sensitive paths.
frontend/public/site.webmanifest: PWA web manifest for KIDS Indoor Play & Event defining app metadata, icons, and shortcuts for booking parties, signing waivers, and viewing the gallery.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap for kids405.com listing all major page sections (home, media, pricing, about, community, testimonials, waivers) with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application that sets up React Query, routing (TanStack Router), and context providers, defining routes for the main page, waiver, admin, and employee check-in pages.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying facility highlights (safety, cleanliness, age-appropriateness, supervision) and important visitor requirements for the indoor playground.
frontend/src/components/Admin.tsx: Empty Admin component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogTab.ts: An admin panel tab for creating, editing, and deleting blog articles, with fields for content, tags, categories, featured image upload, and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/components/BirthdayPackages: Birthday party packages section displaying Basic and other package tiers with weekday/weekend pricing, included passes, socks, and party room time, with a contact scroll button.
frontend/src/components/Blog.tsx: Empty Blog component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/CommunityBoard.t: Empty CommunityBoard component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section displaying the facility's address, phone number, email, and daily hours in a four-column card grid layout.
frontend/src/components/DailyAdmission.t: Daily admission pricing section showing weekday ($10) and weekend ($12) per-child rates with details on all-day access, free adult passes, and additional adult fees.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Empty FAQ component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWaiverBu: A fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that navigates users to the '/waiver' route when clicked.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with branding, social media links, quick navigation links to page sections, and hidden links to admin/employee routes.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: A masonry-style photo gallery section that fetches images via a query hook, normalizes URLs, shows a loading state, and opens a lightbox on image click.
A fullscreen lightbox overlay for browsing gallery images with keyboard navigation (arrow keys/Escape), previous/next buttons, and an image counter.
frontend/src/components/GroupDiscounts.t: A static section displaying group discount pricing ($9/child for 10+ children) with details on eligible groups and benefits.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky navigation header with scroll-aware active section tracking, mobile menu toggle, language switcher, and links to page sections and the waiver route.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with gradient background, logo, translated headline/subtitle, and buttons to navigate to the waiver page or scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Media.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyPasses.ts: Displays a $50/child unlimited monthly pass section with a benefits grid and a CTA button that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Newsletter.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Packages.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PlayAreas.tsx: Renders a grid of six themed play area cards (Toddler Zone, Climbing, Active, Interactive, Creative, Adventure) with icons and a safety callout banner.
frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PrivateEvents.ts: Section for booking the entire facility privately, showing two rental tiers (2-hour at $650 and a second option) with capacity, deposit, and feature details plus a contact CTA.
frontend/src/components/Requirements.tsx: Displays facility entry requirements including a mandatory waiver policy and grip socks policy in two side-by-side cards with a sign-waiver CTA button.
frontend/src/components/SafetyNotice.tsx: Prominent safety notice section requiring grip socks for all children, with pricing ($2 kids / $2.50 adults) available at the front desk.
frontend/src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/SocialShare.tsx: A React component that renders social sharing buttons for Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and a copy-link option, with optional Web Share API support.
frontend/src/components/WaiverCheck.tsx: An employee-facing waiver lookup component that requires Internet Identity authentication and allows searching or browsing recently submitted waivers with expandable detail views.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Defines a React context and TypeScript interfaces for English/Spanish bilingual support, covering all UI sections such as navigation, hero, admission, birthday packages, and requirements.
frontend/src/file-storage/FileList.tsx: Provides hooks and utility functions for listing files from the ICP backend canister and constructing environment-aware (local vs. production) file URLs.
frontend/src/file-storage/FileUpload.tsx: Provides a `useFileUpload` hook that uploads files to the ICP backend in 2MB chunks, reporting progress and invalidating the file list query on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend interactions including user profiles, waivers, website content, gallery images, file management, and email subscribers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds utility styles for scrollbars, animations, and mobile responsiveness.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPlaceholder.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing waivers, website content, gallery images, file uploads, and email subscribers, gated behind Internet Identity authentication and admin role checks.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeCheckIn.tsx: Employee-facing check-in page that allows searching customers by name and recording their visit via a check-in mutation, displaying results and success/error toasts.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeWaiverCheck.t: React page that allows employees to search and view recent waivers by child or parent name, with auto-refreshing recent waivers list and expandable waiver detail cards.
frontend/src/pages/WaiverPage.tsx: React page presenting a comprehensive liability waiver and photo release form for parents/guardians to complete before their children participate in activities at KIDS Indoor Play & Event.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining CSS variable-based color tokens, border radius variants, and accordion keyframe animations with the tailwindcss-animate plugin.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for KIDS Indoor Play tracking existing features and a pending request to update private event rental pricing to $650 (2-hour) and $800 (3-hour).
